---
title: "Key Findings"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
```

## Assessment Overview

The tables below summarize the transparency scores for both User-Generated Content (UGC) and Advertising (Ads) data access, enabling quick comparison across platforms and geographic regions.

Each score ranges from 0 to 100 points, combining weighted evaluations of special criteria (75% weight) and other operational criteria (25% weight). Higher scores indicate greater transparency and data accessibility for researchers and the public.

```{python}
#| label: fig-overview-dotplot
#| fig-cap: "Average transparency scores by region"

from utils.summary_table import generate_overview_dotplot
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

fig = generate_overview_dotplot()
plt.show()
plt.close(fig)
```

::: {.grid style="margin: 20px 0;"}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #F3496B; color: #661F2D; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Not available
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #F64A9B; color: #661F40; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Irrelevant
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #F88C4A; color: #663A1F; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Precarious
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #F3CE49; color: #66571F; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Deficient
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #43B5DF; color: #1F5366; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Restricted
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-2 style="padding: 10px; background-color: #308BF2; color: #143A66; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;"}
Strong
:::

:::

## UGC (User-Generated Content) Assessments

```{python}
from utils.summary_table import generate_summary_heatmap
from IPython.display import HTML, display

display(HTML(generate_summary_heatmap('ugc', include_average_row=True, show_values=True)))
```

## Ads Assessments

```{python}
display(HTML(generate_summary_heatmap('ads', include_average_row=True, show_values=True)))
```

::: {.callout-note}
Bluesky is excluded from the Ads assessment as the platform does not have advertising.
:::
